SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 2, m) FROM test_map_sort;
SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 3, m) FROM test_map_sort;
SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 5, m) FROM test_map_sort;
CREATE TABLE test_nested AS SELECT map('a', 10, 'b', 20) AS m;
SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 1, (SELECT m FROM test_nested));
WITH (SELECT map('key1', 50, 'key2', 70) AS inner_map) AS temp_map SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 1, inner_map) FROM test_map_sort;
CREATE TABLE test_multiple_maps (map_a Map(String, UInt32), map_b Map(String, UInt32));
SELECT mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 2, mapConcat(map_a, map_b)) FROM test_multiple_maps;
